hero.note: A neighbourhood dining room in Borough
hero.title: British seasons, beautifully plated.
hero.description: Thoughtful cooking, warm service and produce gathered from growers, day boats and makers across the UK.
hero.imageAlt: Signature sea bass dish with seasonal vegetables on a sculptural white plate

products.title: A taste of the menu
products.description: A concise menu that changes with the market, balancing familiar flavours with a light modern touch.

items.name: Day-boat bass
items.description: Peas, smoked mussel, lovage and cider beurre blanc.
items.imageAlt: Plated sea bass with green seasonal garnish

items.name: Cotswold chicken
items.description: Morels, wild garlic and roast chicken jus.
items.imageAlt: Roast chicken plated with seasonal vegetables

items.name: Garden tomatoes
items.description: Goat's curd, preserved lemon and basil oil.
items.imageAlt: Colourful seasonal tomato and herb plate

feature.title: Cooking with clarity, not clutter.
feature.description: Chef-founder Mara Ellis builds each plate around one exceptional ingredient. Sauces are deep, garnishes earn their place, and the room stays relaxed.
feature.imageAlt: Chef plating a refined dish in the restaurant kitchen

packages.title: Make an occasion of it
packages.description: From a long lunch to a private celebration, every booking is shaped around the people at the table.

items.name: Market lunch
items.description: A generous midweek menu for an unhurried afternoon.

items.name: Tasting evening
items.description: Our fullest expression of the season, served at your pace.

items.name: Private room
items.description: An intimate dining room with a bespoke menu and dedicated host.

gallery.title: Life around the table
gallery.description: Plates, people and the small details that make an evening memorable.

rowOne.caption: A quiet moment at the pass

story.title: A generous room with a serious kitchen.
story.description: Halcyon began as a Sunday supper club. Today the spirit is the same: thoughtful food, no ceremony, and a room where everyone is looked after.
story.imageAlt: Elegant and welcoming restaurant dining room
story.quote: The best meals feel composed, but never rehearsed.

process.title: From field to plate
process.description: A short supply chain and daily conversations keep the menu alive.

steps.title: Source
steps.description: We buy directly from trusted growers, fishers and makers.

steps.title: Taste
steps.description: The morning's produce decides what earns a place on the menu.

steps.title: Prepare
steps.description: Classical technique, careful seasoning and minimal waste.

steps.title: Welcome
steps.description: Warm service, useful guidance and time to enjoy the table.

testimonials.title: Kind words from the dining room
testimonials.description: Recent notes from lunches, celebrations and returning regulars.

items.quote: Every course felt precise, but the whole evening was wonderfully relaxed.
items.name: Amelia R.

items.quote: The private room was beautiful and the team quietly handled every detail.
items.name: Daniel K.

items.quote: A genuinely seasonal menu and some of the warmest service in London.
items.name: Priya S.

visit.title: Come hungry. Leave happy.
visit.description: A short walk from Borough Market. Please tell us about allergies or access needs when booking.

footer.note: Modern British dining, served with warmth.
